subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God, thou art a sign of divine mercy and a servant of the Lord God, aflame with the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله ایت رحمانی و خادم حضرت یزدان بنار محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
